title: mariscus milnei
intro: Mariscus milnei, also known as the East Indian sedge, is a type of plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, Mariscus milnei has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, Mariscus milnei is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
